message:
fix(ci): resolve clippy errors and update npm lock file

- Remove unnecessary .map_err(|e| e) calls (map_identity lint)
- Convert indexed loops to iterator-based loops where appropriate
- Add crate-level #![allow(clippy::needless_range_loop)] for numerical code clarity
- Regenerate package-lock.json to fix playwright/tailwindcss version mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
